targets.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT ON(model_name) model_name,ROUND(accuracy::numeric,3) accuracy,ROUND(precision_score::numeric,3) prec,ROUND(recall::numeric,3) recall,ROUND(f1_score::numeric,3) f1 FROM model_metrics ORDER BY model_name,trained_at DESC;
SELECT trained_at AS time,model_name AS metric,f1_score AS value FROM model_metrics ORDER BY trained_at;
SELECT trained_at,model_name,ROUND(accuracy::numeric,3) acc,ROUND(f1_score::numeric,3) f1 FROM model_metrics ORDER BY trained_at DESC LIMIT 30;
